mapper.sql: space_id, user_id, quota_bytes, used_bytes, reserved_bytes, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from drive_space where space_id = #{spaceId, jdbcType=BINARY} for update
mapper.insert: insert into drive_space(space_id, user_id, quota_bytes, used_bytes, reserved_bytes, created_at, updated_at) values( #{spaceId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{quotaBytes}, #{usedBytes}, #{reservedBytes}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
